author: Evan Borodow
name: Depth Recurrence 5x3 d672 SwiGLU
blurb: 5 unique transformer blocks reused 3x for 15 effective layers at width 672 with SwiGLU MLP. Same ~16.5M param budget, 67% more effective depth and 31% wider than baseline via parameter sharing. Eval at 2048 seqlen for longer context. SP-1024 tied embeddings, int8+zlib under 16MB.
